meaning: adj.多情的,恋爱的,表示爱情的
examples: Amorous initiative is firmly reserved to the man, who sets about courtship with a club.
The article stated that Dolly was an amorous type and that she liked burly, blue-collar kinds of men.
The book's title is also a double entendre, as Ms. Beaulieu recounts her own amorous adventures.
Make mention, too, of other recent amorous conquests--it will get your target's competitive juices flowing.
